items.title: German elections 2025 LIVE: Germany votes to elect a new government
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as German voters go to the polls to elect a new parliament that will determine how the country is run for the next four years.

Four candidates are running to be Germany’s next leader: incumbent Chancellor Olaf Scholz, of the center-left Social Democrats; Friedrich Merz, the candidate of the mainstream conservative Christian Democratic Union party; current Vice Chancellor Robert Habeck, of the environmentalist Greens; and Alice Weidel, of the far-right, anti-immigration Alternative for Germany, or AfD. Follow latest updates here: https://bit.ly/4ieakjD

#germany #election #live</article>

items.title: Zelenskyy comments on US aid, and Trump 'dictator' remarks
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said on Sunday that he doesn't recognize U.S. aid as Ukraine's debt and is "not signing something that will be paid off by ten generations of Ukrainians." 
Zelenskyy also responded to US President Donald Trump's calling him a "dictator" by saying he is not offended since it is not something he is.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu confirmed on Sunday that Israeli tanks had moved into the occupied West Bank for the first time since 2002.

items.title: First-time voter casts ballot in German election, shares fears and hopes for the future
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>First-time voter Gesa Schönwolff shared her fears and hopes for the future as she cast her ballot in Berlin on Sunday. Schönwolff said she fears the focus on migration in Germany's election is steering voters away from other important issues.

items.title: American Airlines flight from New York to Delhi makes unscheduled landing in Rome
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>An American Airlines flight en route from New York to New Delhi turned around over the Caspian Sea on Sunday and landed in Rome, a spokesman from with Leonardo da Vinci Airport said. (AP video by Paolo Santalucia)

items.title: Tens of thousands fill Beirut stadium for funerals for Hezbollah leaders
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Tens of thousands of people packed into a stadium in Beirut early Sunday to attend the funeral of Hezbollah's former leader, nearly five months after he was killed in an Israeli airstrike on a southern suburb of the Lebanese capital.

items.title: What happens to the leadership of the Catholic Church when a pope becomes incapacitated?
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>While the Vatican has detailed laws and rituals to ensure the transfer of power when a pope dies or resigns, they do not apply if he is sick or even unconscious. And there are no specific norms outlining what happens to the leadership of the Catholic Church if a pope becomes totally incapacitated.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Israel ramps up West Bank crackdown as end of Gaza ceasefire deal approaches, AP explains
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Israel's defense minister said Sunday troops would remain “for the coming year” in parts of the occupied West Bank where they have launched a weekslong offensive and would prevent tens of thousands of displaced Palestinians from returning, as Israel deepens its crackdown on the Palestinian territory.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress

items.title: LIVE: Outside hospital in Rome where Pope Francis is being treated
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live view from outside the Gemelli Hospital in Rome after the Vatican said that Pope Francis rested during a peaceful night following a respiratory crisis and blood transfusions. The brief update came after doctors said the 88-year-old pope, who had part of one lung removed as a young man, was in critical condition on Saturday. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4hN1U2Q

#popefrancis #pope #live</article>

items.title: Argentine faithful pray for Pope Francis' recovery
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Catholic faithful in Argentina have been praying for Pope Francis' recovery. The pontiff, 88, who is from Argentina, remained in a critical condition on Sunday after he suffered a prolonged asthmatic respiratory crisis while being treated for pneumonia and a complex lung infection, the Vatican said. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4hN1U2Q

#argentina #popefrancis #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

<article>Live from the 31st annual Screen Actors Guild Awards red carpet at the Shrine Auditorium in Los Angeles. Ariana Grande, Timothée Chalamet, Selena Gomez and Mikey Madison are among the nominees expected on the SAG Awards red carpet.

#sagawards #redcarpet #live</article>

items.title: Who is CDU leader Friedrich Merz, the front-runner in German election?
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Germany's opposition leader Friedrich Merz is the front-runner in the country's election campaign, with his center-right Union bloc leading polls. The 69-year-old became leader of the Christian Democratic Union after Chancellor Angela Merkel stepped down in 2021, though he joined the party decades before. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4hMZjG8

#germany #election #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Vatican says Pope Francis had 'peaceful' night in hospital following respiratory crisis
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Pope Francis, in critical condition with a complex lung infection, rested well during a peaceful night following a respiratory crisis and blood transfusions, the Vatican said Sunday. (AP video shot by: Francesca Primavilla) Read more here: https://bit.ly/4hN1U2Q

#popefrancis #pope #news

items.title: After 30 years in prison for murder, new DNA evidence frees Hawaii man
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A Hawaii man who spent 30 years in prison for a murder he long denied committing declared the day “Freedom Friday” and said he was eager to visit his mother after a judge ordered him released because of new DNA evidence. Read more here: https://bit.ly/3Xfr6qq

#hawaii #news #usa

items.title: Hunter Schafer on why she spoke out about being issued a male passport
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Hunter Schafer says “it's important to just keep track of where things are in our country.” The “Euphoria” star, who is trans, spoke at the Spirit Awards a day after posting a video in which she revealed her new passport had been issued with a male gender marker. Read more here: https://bit.ly/437GRmU
